final_prompt.prompt:
Create a close-up food photography image of a Japanese ramen bowl (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a "美食摄影" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Nobu Tamura food photography (Japanese culinary close-up tradition), Kinfolk magazine editorial food styling, 2010s Japanese ramen shop menu photography; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be close-up with chopsticks lifting noodles as the focal gesture, shallow depth of field with background blur
Subject: must include:
  - 豚骨 broth (rich, milky, opaque)
  - 叉烧 (chashu pork slices)
  - 溏心蛋 (soft-boiled egg, halved to show jammy yolk)
  - 海苔 (nori sheet)
  - 葱花 (scallion garnish)
  - lifted noodles held by chopsticks
Scene/backdrop: must include a blurred background (bokeh), steam rising from the bowl
Lighting/mood: needs an appetite-driven warm atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a rich, warm and saturated direction evoking depth of broth — exact hex values are yours
Materials/textures: needs a glossy broth surface with visible steam wisps and textured noodle strands — exact grain / sheen is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default
Avoid:
